tasks.name: Create widget error fallback UI component
tasks.purpose: Build reusable error display component with friendly message, icon, and retry button

constraints: Must accept widgetName prop for error message customization
Must accept onRetry callback prop
Use Alert variant='destructive' or custom muted styling
Include AlertTriangle icon
Message format: 'Unable to load [widget name]'
Description: 'Something went wrong. Please try again.'
Button text: 'Try Again'
Use role='alert' for screen readers
Center content within Card structure

tasks.input_state: No widget error fallback component exists
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component exports WidgetErrorFallback with widgetName and onRetry props
tasks.verification_command: test -f apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/widget-error-fallback.tsx && grep -q 'export.*WidgetErrorFallback' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/widget-error-fallback.tsx && grep -q 'widgetName' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/widget-error-fallback.tsx && grep -q 'onRetry' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/widget-error-fallback.tsx && pnpm typecheck --filter web

tasks.name: Create widget error boundary wrapper component
tasks.purpose: Build reusable error boundary that wraps widgets and renders WidgetErrorFallback on error

constraints: Must accept widgetName prop to pass to fallback
Must accept children prop
Use ErrorBoundary from @kit/ui as base
Pass custom fallback function that renders WidgetErrorFallback
Reset function should trigger re-render of children
Export as 'use client' component

tasks.input_state: WidgetErrorFallback exists, no error boundary wrapper exists
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component exports WidgetErrorBoundary wrapping ErrorBoundary with custom fallback
tasks.verification_command: test -f apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/widget-error-boundary.tsx && grep -q 'export.*WidgetErrorBoundary' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/widget-error-boundary.tsx && grep -q "'use client'" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/widget-error-boundary.tsx && grep -q 'ErrorBoundary' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/widget-error-boundary.tsx && grep -q 'WidgetErrorFallback' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/widget-error-boundary.tsx && pnpm typecheck --filter web

tasks.name: Wrap all dashboard widgets with WidgetErrorBoundary
tasks.purpose: Protect each dashboard widget with individual error boundary for isolation

patterns.expected_action: widget errors caught without crashing page

constraints: Wrap each widget Card or widget component individually
Use descriptive widgetName props matching feature.md widget names
Widget names: 'course progress', 'skills assessment', 'tasks', 'activity', 'actions', 'coaching sessions', 'presentations'
Import WidgetErrorBoundary at top of page.tsx
Do not wrap the entire dashboard - wrap individual widgets for isolation

tasks.input_state: Dashboard widgets exist without error boundaries, WidgetErrorBoundary component available
tasks.output_state: Each dashboard widget wrapped in WidgetErrorBoundary with appropriate widgetName
tasks.acceptance_criterion: All 7 widget sections wrapped with WidgetErrorBoundary in page.tsx
tasks.verification_command: grep -q "import.*WidgetErrorBoundary.*from" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/page.tsx && grep -c 'WidgetErrorBoundary' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/page.tsx | grep -E '^[7-9]|^[1-9][0-9]+$' && pnpm typecheck --filter web

tasks.name: Audit dashboard accessibility compliance
tasks.purpose: Document accessibility gaps across dashboard for heading hierarchy, ARIA, keyboard nav, contrast

files: All empty state component files from F2, F3, F4
constraints: Check heading hierarchy (h1 -> h2 -> h3, no skips)
Check all interactive elements for keyboard accessibility
Verify ARIA labels on empty states, loading states, error states
Test color contrast ratios (4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text)
Verify focus indicators visible on all interactive elements
Check prefers-reduced-motion for animations
Document findings in audit report file

tasks.input_state: Dashboard complete with empty states, no accessibility audit performed
tasks.output_state: Accessibility audit report exists listing all gaps and required fixes
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Audit report file exists documenting heading, ARIA, keyboard, and contrast issues
tasks.verification_command: test -f apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/a11y-audit-report.md && grep -q 'Heading Hierarchy' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/a11y-audit-report.md && grep -q 'ARIA Attributes' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/a11y-audit-report.md && grep -q 'Keyboard Navigation' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/a11y-audit-report.md && grep -q 'Color Contrast' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/a11y-audit-report.md

tasks.name: Fix heading hierarchy in empty state components
tasks.purpose: Ensure proper h1 -> h2 -> h3 hierarchy across dashboard empty states

files: Empty state component files identified in audit
constraints: Page title (PageHeader) should be h1
Widget titles (CardTitle) should be h2
Empty state headings should be h3 or use aria-level attribute
No heading level skips (h1 -> h3 is invalid)
Update all empty state components to use correct heading levels
Preserve existing styling while fixing semantic structure

tasks.input_state: Audit report identifies heading hierarchy issues in empty states
tasks.output_state: All empty state components use correct h3 level or aria-level for headings
tasks.acceptance_criterion: All empty state headings are h3 and no heading skips exist in hierarchy
tasks.verification_command: grep -L '<h1' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/empty-states/*.tsx | wc -l | grep -E '^[5-9]|^[1-9][0-9]+$' && pnpm typecheck --filter web

tasks.name: Add ARIA attributes to empty states
tasks.purpose: Add role, aria-live, aria-label, and aria-describedby attributes for screen reader support

dependencies: ARIA specification for role, aria-live, aria-label
constraints: Empty state containers: role='status' or aria-live='polite'
Loading skeletons: aria-busy='true' and aria-label describing loading state
Error states: role='alert' (already on Alert component)
CTAs: aria-label where button text is insufficient
Interactive elements: aria-describedby linking to explanatory text
Avoid redundant labels (don't duplicate visible text in aria-label)

tasks.input_state: Audit report identifies missing ARIA attributes on empty states and loading states
tasks.output_state: All empty states, loading states, and CTAs have appropriate ARIA attributes
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Empty states have role='status', skeletons have aria-busy, CTAs have descriptive labels
tasks.verification_command: grep -r "role=\"status\"" apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/empty-states/ | wc -l | grep -E '^[3-9]|^[1-9][0-9]+$' && grep -r 'aria-busy' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/ | grep -q 'true' && pnpm typecheck --filter web

tasks.name: Fix keyboard navigation and focus management
tasks.purpose: Ensure all interactive elements are keyboard accessible with visible focus indicators

constraints: All CTAs must be keyboard accessible via Tab key
Focus order must follow visual order (top to bottom, left to right)
Focus indicators must be visible (outline or ring with sufficient contrast)
Error retry button should return focus to widget after retry
Use focus-visible: for keyboard-only focus indicators
Test with Tab, Shift+Tab, Enter, Space for all interactive elements
Add focus management to WidgetErrorFallback retry logic

tasks.input_state: Audit report identifies keyboard navigation issues and missing focus indicators
tasks.output_state: All CTAs keyboard accessible, focus indicators visible, retry button restores focus
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Tab navigation works, visible focus indicators on all interactive elements, focus restored after retry
tasks.verification_command: grep -r 'focus-visible:\|focus:' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/ | wc -l | grep -E '^[5-9]|^[1-9][0-9]+$' && grep -q 'focus()' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/widget-error-fallback.tsx && pnpm typecheck --filter web

tasks.name: Verify color contrast compliance
tasks.purpose: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA contrast ratios (4.5:1 normal, 3:1 large, 3:1 focus indicators)

files: All empty state and error UI components
constraints: Normal text (< 18px): 4.5:1 contrast ratio minimum
Large text (>= 18px or 14px bold): 3:1 contrast ratio minimum
Focus indicators: 3:1 contrast against adjacent colors
Test both light and dark modes
Use Tailwind semantic classes to ensure mode compatibility
Document any contrast failures and fixes in audit report
Update classes if needed to meet standards

tasks.input_state: Audit report identifies potential contrast issues
tasks.output_state: All text and focus indicators meet WCAG AA contrast standards in both modes
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Color contrast audit passes for all text and interactive elements in light and dark modes
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'Color Contrast: PASS' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/a11y-audit-report.md && pnpm typecheck --filter web

tasks.name: Verify dark mode and reduced motion support
tasks.purpose: Final verification that all states render correctly in dark mode and respect prefers-reduced-motion

files: All error boundary and empty state components
dependencies: Browser DevTools for theme toggle and motion preference simulation
constraints: Test all empty states in dark mode for contrast and visibility
Test error fallback UI in dark mode
Verify skeleton pulse animations respect prefers-reduced-motion
Check that focus indicators are visible in both modes
Verify no hard-coded colors that break in dark mode
Test with browser dev tools motion preference emulation
Document any dark mode or motion issues found

tasks.input_state: All accessibility fixes complete, error boundaries integrated
tasks.output_state: All dashboard states verified working in dark mode and with reduced motion
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Dark mode renders correctly, animations respect prefers-reduced-motion, no visual regressions
tasks.verification_command: grep -r 'prefers-reduced-motion' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_components/ | grep -q 'motion-reduce' && pnpm typecheck --filter web && pnpm lint --filter web
